description: The most comprehensive book for learning the Arabic alphabet and script: The best introduction for beginners: Most Arabic textbooks explain the entire alphabet in just a few pages, which causes many people to struggle with learning in the long run. This book takes a different approach by focusing entirely on the basics and the Arabic alphabet until you have truly mastered it. This ensures you have the most enjoyable start to learning Arabic. Strong focus on repetition: Are you worried that you might forget the alphabet after a while? After a detailed but easy-to-understand theoretical introduction to the Arabic language, you will find over 400 writing exercises in which you will learn to read and write every letter, every variation of each letter, as well as words and, in the end, entire Arabic sentences. Our accompanying digital flashcards in the free Arabic online course ensure that you will never forget the entire alphabet again. Perfectly prepared for the Quran: Would you like to learn Arabic so that you can read the al-Qur'ān al-Karīm (the noble Quran)? This book contains a 4-step learning guide that will help you build a solid foundation for reading the Quran with complete clarity. It takes a lot of work to learn Arabic to a high level, but this book and the learning guide will help you do it as easily and confidently as possible. Learn Arabic correctly from the very beginning and have the book in your hands in just 1–3 days by clicking on “Buy now” in the top right corner. With this book, you will experience daily success and get closer to your goal of learning Arabic as effectiv as possible. Contents of the book: 20-page introduction to the Arabic language 120+ pages of progressive writing exercises Learn all 4 writing variants per letter Learn all the important diacritical marks ( Taschkīl ), which are especially important for the Quran Pronunciation help with example words and audio BONUS: free access to our Arabic language course on Knowt with over 200 digital flashcards with audio function to help you memorize the alphabet and pronunciation This book is for anyone who wants to learn Arabic seriously and in the best possible way. Click on “Buy now” and you'll have the book in your hands in a few days. I wish you every success in learning Arabic! Read more
